title: Sci-Fi Concept Art Vehicle Design
promptText: A detailed concept art design sheet for a [VEHICLE_TYPE] from a [SETTING_ERA] science fiction universe. The vehicle features [DESIGN_ELEMENTS] with a design philosophy that blends [DESIGN_INFLUENCES]. Shown from multiple angles: front 3/4 view (hero shot), side profile, and a detail callout of [DETAIL_FOCUS]. Color scheme: [COLORS]. The surface shows [SURFACE_TREATMENT]. Environment context: parked/flying in [ENVIRONMENT]. Concept art style with clean line work, professional presentation on a neutral gray background with subtle grid. Annotations pointing to key design features. Artstation trending, industry professional quality.
description: Concept art design sheets are the foundation of visual development for films, games, and graphic novels. This prompt generates professional-quality vehicle concept art presented in the industry-standard design sheet format with multiple angles and detail callouts. The annotation requirement adds the technical communication layer that distinguishes professional concept art from fan art. By specifying design influences, you create vehicles that feel grounded in recognizable aesthetics while remaining original. Use these for game development pitches, film pre-production, personal portfolio pieces, or worldbuilding reference materials.

variables.name: SETTING_ERA
variables.description: The sci-fi setting's time period and style

variables.name: DESIGN_ELEMENTS
variables.example: forward-swept wings, exposed thruster arrays, a bubble canopy, and retractable sensor mast

variables.name: DESIGN_INFLUENCES
variables.example: Soviet-era MiG fighter jets with SpaceX Starship industrial aesthetics

variables.name: DETAIL_FOCUS
variables.description: What to show in the detail callout
variables.example: the cockpit interior with holographic HUD layout

variables.name: COLORS
variables.example: matte gunmetal gray with burnt orange accent markings and weathered white hull panels

variables.name: SURFACE_TREATMENT
variables.example: panel lines, heat-scorched thruster areas, repaired battle damage with mismatched hull plates

variables.name: ENVIRONMENT
variables.example: a dusty forward operating base on a Mars-like planet

tips: Add 'no text' to your negative prompt if the AI adds unwanted labels
Use ControlNet with a rough sketch for more precise shape control
Request interior layout as a separate prompt for cockpit design details
exampleOutput: A professional concept art design sheet on neutral gray background with grid. A near-future reconnaissance starfighter shown from three angles. Forward-swept wings, bubble canopy, and exposed thruster arrays. Soviet MiG meets SpaceX industrial design. Matte gunmetal gray with burnt orange accent markings. Weathered hull with repaired battle damage. Detail callout showing holographic cockpit HUD. Annotation lines pointing to sensor mast and thruster configuration. Parked on a dusty Mars-like base.
metaTitle: Sci-Fi Concept Art Vehicle Design for SD
metaDescription: Create professional concept art design sheets for sci-fi vehicles and spacecraft. Try this Stable Diffusion prompt for game and film pre-production.
